title: Fresh Squeezed Lemonade
description: Bright, refreshing homemade lemonade made with real lemons and a simple syrup. Nothing beats it on a hot day.

steps.instruction: Make simple syrup: Combine sugar and 1 cup water in a small saucepan. Heat over medium, stirring, until sugar dissolves completely. Remove from heat and cool.
Juice the lemons until you have 1 cup of fresh lemon juice. Strain out the seeds.
In a large pitcher, combine lemon juice, cooled simple syrup, and 4 cups of cold water. Stir well.
Taste and adjust — add more lemon for tartness or more simple syrup for sweetness.
Serve over plenty of ice, garnished with lemon slices and fresh mint.

notes: For strawberry lemonade, blend ½ cup of fresh strawberries and stir into the finished lemonade.
